---
title: "Contact"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<nav class="fp-nav">
  <div class="fp-nav-inner">
    <a href="index.html" class="fp-nav-logo">Filip <span>Popovic</span></a>
    <ul class="fp-nav-links">
      <li><a href="index.html">Home</a></li>
      <li><a href="projects.html">Projects</a></li>
      <li><a href="about.html">About</a></li>
      <li><a href="contact.html" class="active">Contact</a></li>
    </ul>
    <button class="fp-theme-btn" data-theme-toggle aria-label="Toggle dark mode">
      <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 12.79A9 9 0 1 1 11.21 3 7 7 0 0 0 21 12.79z"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>
</nav>

<section class="fp-section" style="min-height: 70vh; display:flex; align-items:center;">
  <div class="fp-container" style="width:100%;">
    <div class="fp-contact-box" style="max-width:560px;">
      <p style="font-size:var(--text-xs);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--color-primary);margin-bottom:var(--space-3);">Get in touch</p>
      <h2>Let's work<br><em style="font-style:italic;">together</em></h2>
      <p>I'm available for freelance data analysis projects — from one-off analyses to ongoing reporting. Response within 24 hours.</p>
      <div class="fp-contact-links" style="flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:var(--space-3);">
        <a href="mailto:fpopovic01@gmail.com" class="btn btn-primary" style="width:100%; justify-content:center;">
          <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg>
          Send me an email
        </a>
        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/filip-popovic-15037837b/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="btn btn-outline" style="width:100%; justify-content:center;">
          <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M16 8a6 6 0 0 1 6 6v7h-4v-7a2 2 0 0 0-2-2 2 2 0 0 0-2 2v7h-4v-7a6 6 0 0 1 6-6z"/><rect x="2" y="9" width="4" height="12"/><circle cx="4" cy="4" r="2"/></svg>
          LinkedIn
        </a>
        <a href="https://github.com/filip-popovic" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="btn btn-outline" style="width:100%; justify-content:center;">
          <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M9 19c-5 1.5-5-2.5-7-3m14 6v-3.87a3.37 3.37 0 0 0-.94-2.61c3.14-.35 6.44-1.54 6.44-7A5.44 5.44 0 0 0 20 4.77 5.07 5.07 0 0 0 19.91 1S18.73.65 16 2.48a13.38 13.38 0 0 0-7 0C6.27.65 5.09 1 5.09 1A5.07 5.07 0 0 0 5 4.77a5.44 5.44 0 0 0-1.5 3.78c0 5.42 3.3 6.61 6.44 7A3.37 3.37 0 0 0 9 18.13V22"/></svg>
          GitHub
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer class="fp-footer">
  <p>© 2026 Filip Popovic · Vienna, Austria</p>
</footer>

<script>
(function(){
  const t = document.querySelector('[data-theme-toggle]');
  const r = document.documentElement;
  let d = matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme:dark)').matches ? 'dark' : 'light';
  r.setAttribute('data-theme', d);
  if(t) t.addEventListener('click', () => { d = d === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark'; r.setAttribute('data-theme', d); });
})();
</script>
```
